---
title: "Ksithy"
format:
  html:
    classes: [home-page]
about:
  template: jolla
  image: images/profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kshithy-ravindran-443189266/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/kshithy2000-png
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:contact@kshithy.com
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Welcome {{< fa wave-square >}}
I am a technical professional focused on creating clean, dependable solutions with Python, data analysis, and modern web development.
:::

This portfolio highlights projects, professional experience, and the tools I use to solve real problems.

## Highlights

- {{< fa python >}} Experienced in Python development and data-driven workflows
- {{< fa globe >}} Skilled in building user-focused web and application solutions
- {{< fa comments >}} Strong communicator who values clarity and reliability

## Current Focus

- [x] Building this professional portfolio
- [ ] Expanding data visualization skills
- [ ] Learning advanced cloud technologies
- [ ] Contributing to open-source projects

::: {.highlight-box .bg-primary .text-white .p-3 .rounded}
**Key Strength:** Combining technical expertise with business acumen to deliver impactful solutions.
:::

## Objectives

- Develop polished digital work with a practical business focus
- Maintain strong collaboration across technical teams
- Continue growing skills through real-world projects
